title: alyssum campestre
intro: Alyssum campestre, also known as field alyssum, is a low-growing, annual herb native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its delicate white flowers and fragrance. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Alyssum campestre include its ability to reduce stress and promote relaxation, due to its calming scent and sedative properties. Alyssum campestre can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote sleep, ease anxiety, and support immune function.
